Question 2: Description: Does text briefly describe contents of each section? Yes, each chapter description provided. So compliance true.

Feedback: "Teksts īsi apraksta katras nodaļas saturu..."

Question 3: Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? Since it enumerates chapters and describes content, structure is clear. So compliance true.
